The Essence
Close your eyes. One breath.
This water has moved through ancient earth
since before any of us were born.
Then gold. Then you.
Drink accordingly.
Four Pillars
What holds the brand.
01
The Gold Ritual
Every bottle is a ceremony. The pour, the shimmer, the pause — Aujal choreographs a moment, not a transaction.
02
Heritage & Craft
Rooted in South Asian ornament and old-world goldsmithing. The star-lattice signals lineage, not novelty.
03
Uncompromising Purity
UV-treated water in inert glass. Clarity is the canvas; gold is the only thing allowed to interrupt it.
04
The Gift of Status
Aujal is given as much as it is drunk — an object that says the host, the moment and the guest all matter.
The 24K Standard

Real gold. Real purity.
Nothing else.

Every bottle of AUJAL begins as purified, UV-treated water — clean to the last drop. Into it, we suspend flakes of genuine 24-karat edible gold, so that light moves through the bottle the way it moves through a chandelier.

◈
24K Edible Gold
Genuine, food-grade gold infused into every bottle. Not imitation. Not colourant. The real element — visible, shimmering, authentic.
◇
Purified Water
UV-treated and purified for absolute clarity. Only two ingredients exist in every bottle: water and gold. Zero compromise on either.
◈
pH 8.5+ Alkaline
Naturally alkaline, supporting the body's own balance. A foundation of purity — before the gold even enters.
◇
Recyclable Glass
Premium recyclable glass, made to be kept — not discarded. Luxury that respects the drinker and the world it is poured into.
◈
FSSAI & ISO Certified
Produced in full compliance with India's food safety standards. ISO 9001:2015 certified. Every batch verified for purity.
◇
South Asian Heritage
The star-lattice motif drawn from the girih tradition — geometry as devotion. Gold's ancient link to ceremony, embodied.

For Hospitality

The detail your guests remember.

In luxury, the smallest gestures carry the most weight. A welcome drink that glints with gold. A dining table set with something no other property offers. A suite stocked with a bottle that feels like a gift.

AUJAL gives your venue a signature — a talking point that elevates the experience and quietly signals that here, every detail has been considered.

⟡ The Welcome
Greet arriving guests and VIPs with a 250ml pour that sets the tone before a word is spoken.
⟡ The Table
Replace ordinary still water with AUJAL at fine-dining covers, private dinners, and celebrations.
⟡ The Suite & The Banquet
Stock suites, host weddings and galas, and create gifting moments with the 500ml and 1000ml formats.

The Ritual

More than water.
A moment.

This is not just water. This is a moment of clarity, a touch of gold, a ritual of refinement.

01
The Pause
Close your eyes. One breath. Before you pour, acknowledge the moment.
02
The Pour
Watch the gold flecks catch the light as AUJAL meets glass — a private ceremony in motion.
03
The Shimmer
Hold the glass to the light. Let the 24K gold suspend in stillness. Appreciate what is in your hand.
04
Drink accordingly.
Some things are not meant to be rushed. This is one of them.

The Gift Collection

About Aujal

Born of earth.
Elevated by gold.

AUJAL is an ultra-premium water brand by Eykam Wellness Pvt. Ltd., established in 2026 in New Delhi. We do not sell hydration — we sell the moment around it. Our mission is to craft impeccably pure, gold-infused water and present it with a level of design and ceremony the category has never seen.

Founder
Tejas Bhatnagar
Co-Founder & Chief Executive Officer
"A future where hydration transcends necessity and becomes an experience of luxury and refinement."

An entrepreneur driven by the pursuit of excellence and innovation in the premium lifestyle space. With a strong commitment to quality and brand excellence, building AUJAL into a distinguished name that embodies prestige, elegance, and a modern approach to luxury living.

✉ aujalgold@gmail.com ✆ +91 88003 05043
Founder
Lorrish Sharma
Co-Founder & Chief Vision Officer
"True luxury lies in purity, innovation, and wellness — AUJAL is more than a beverage. It is a statement of elevated living."

Visionary behind AUJAL's brand philosophy — redefining the way the world experiences water. Through commitment to premium craftsmanship and innovation, positioning AUJAL as a globally recognised symbol of luxury, wellness, and timeless elegance.

✉ aujalgold@gmail.com ✆ +91 84487 70400
Digital Presence
Intern · Digital
Aseem Parashar
Digital Intern & Architect of AUJAL's Online Presence
"AUJAL's digital world is built with the same philosophy as the bottle in your hand — every detail considered, nothing left to chance."

Aseem Parashar is the digital intern at Eykam Wellness Pvt. Ltd. and the person behind AUJAL's entire digital presence. From conceptualising and building the website to shaping the brand's product strategy online, he brings the luxury of AUJAL into the digital world — crafting every touchpoint with the same precision and refinement the brand stands for.
